scripts.build: bun run clean && bun install && bun run build:sdk && bun -F @clinebot/cli build
scripts.dev: bun --conditions=development run build:sdk && bun run cli && bun run cli hub stop
scripts.test:unit: bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; bun -F @clinebot/agents test & p1=$!; bun -F @clinebot/llms test & p2=$!; bun -F @clinebot/core test:unit & p3=$!; bun -F @clinebot/cli test:unit & p4=$!; wait $p1; wait $p2; wait $p3; wait $p4'
scripts.verify:routines: zsh -lc 'cd packages/core && bunx vitest run src/cron/schedule-service.test.ts --config vitest.config.ts'
scripts.check: bun biome check --diagnostic-level=error && bun run build:sdk && bun run -F @clinebot/cli build && bun --parallel -F './packages/**' -F @clinebot/cli typecheck && bun scripts/check-publish.ts
